text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huh, Trainer?! S-sorry, I'm a little tired today.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... To be honest, I borrowed a comic from my
friend and read it all in one go...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: But it was so interesting! I went and borrowed the rest of the volumes too!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: ...Oh, I promise not to stay up all night reading!
